speaker: Annie
text: Hey, are we meeting after class? 🤗

speaker: Antony
text: Where are you right now? I hope you’re not with Alex, I don’t like that idea. 😠

speaker: Annie
text: I’m just in the library, relax. 😅

speaker: Antony
text: You know it drives me a little mad thinking of you with other guys. It’s like a small madness inside. 😬

speaker: Antony
text: I know… but my jealousy is hard to control sometimes. 😞

speaker: Annie
text: I trust you, but you need to trust me too. ❤️

speaker: Antony
text: Okay… sorry. You’re my happiness, Annie. 😍

speaker: Annie
text: You are to me as well, but trust is everything. 🙏

speaker: Antony
text: You’re right. Tonight let’s go out just the two of us, deal? ✌️

speaker: Antony
text: I’ll pick you up at eight. Don’t be late, I miss you already. 🤗

speaker: Annie
text: Eight is perfect. I’m wearing the blue dress you like. 💃😍

speaker: Antony
text: That dress is pure joy to me. ❤️ But remember, stay safe walking home. 😟

speaker: Annie
text: Don’t worry. It’s just a short walk; no need for storm-level worry. 😅

speaker: Antony
text: I know, I know… my feelings sometimes feel like a storm. You calm me down. 😌
